products.name: Radomes
products.descriptor: RF-transparent composite enclosures protecting antenna systems

evidence.snippet:
Having just returned from exhibiting our radome solutions at Satellite 2026, the team was well-positioned to walk through these products in detail. Radomes are protective enclosures that shield antenna systems from environmental exposure while maintaining optimal RF signal performance. They are used across a wide range of sectors, from satellite communications to national security infrastructure.
Active programs

### [Radomes](/radomes)
Precision-built, RF-transparent enclosures built to protect and perform in the harshest conditions.

products.name: Dix Design DidiMini Rudder
products.descriptor: Composite rudder for Didi Mini MiniTransat 6.5 sailboat

evidence.snippet:
### **Dix Design DidiMini Rudder**
If you’re building a Didi Mini (MiniTransat 6.5) you’ll want to get your foils from Phil. Shown here is the rudder – you’ll need two!

evidence.snippet:
### **Dix Design DidiMini Tiller**
A nice carbon tiller is a great companion piece to your Phil’s Foils DidiMini rudders.

products.name: Dix Design Didi26 Keel
products.descriptor: CNC-milled laminated timber core composite keel for Didi26 sailboat

evidence.snippet:
### **Dix Design Didi26 Keel**
The Didi26 keel core is one large piece of laminated timber! You don’t really want to shape that yourself, do you? Let our CNC do it for you.

products.name: Hampton One Design Rudder
products.descriptor: Composite rudder for Hampton One Design class sailboat

evidence.snippet:
Hampton One Design
==================
Aug 18
Written By [Emry](/shop-rudders?author=5ccba67795f4210001a0cf5f)
This design came from a Hampton One Design fleet member who sent me his own laminated blank for milling. We’ve built a few more since that first one.

unresolved_questions: All 15 prioritized products were located and recorded. However, the dedicated product pages for Radomes, Radome Tooling, Communication Shelters, Panels & Enclosures, Tanks, and Engineered Parts were not fetched, so descriptors rely only on homepage navigation text and news articles — no detailed specs or configurations are available. The marine rudder catalog (/marine/foils-a-z) appears to contain many additional SKUs beyond the Dix Design and Hampton One Design entries (footers on resource-0005 and resource-0006 reference other rudder pages: Diamond, Dobroth, Hanse, Hinckley, etc.) — these were not in the prioritized list but exist in the corpus.
